https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/voyager/iifacdnjakkhjjiengaffnegbndgingi\

input.description: Find old Chrome Web Store ID
input.prompt:
Find all references to Chrome Web Store extension IDs in this codebase. The new ID is `iifacdnjakkhjjiengaffnegbndgingi`. I need to find the OLD ID that needs to be replaced. Search for:
1. Any chromewebstore.google.com URLs
2. Any chrome.google.com/webstore URLs
3. Any extension ID patterns (32-char lowercase alpha strings that look like extension IDs)
4. Any "extensionId" or similar references

Search thoroughly across all file types including .md, .ts, .tsx, .json, .html, .css, .yaml, .yml, etc.

Return the old extension ID and all files where it appears.
